channel.title: Conferences on Lough on Data
channel.description: Recent content in Conferences on Lough on Data

item.title: Data Saturday #52 — Oslo
item.author: loughondata@protonmail.com (Connor Lough)
item.description: Session notes from Data Saturday #52 in Oslo: tools that came up, Roche’s Maxim, testing in the dev cycle, data mesh, and turning data into influence.

item.title: World Wide Data Vault Consortium 2023
item.author: loughondata@protonmail.com (Connor Lough)
item.description: A recap of WWDVC 2023 in Stowe, Vermont — small, international, and surprisingly star-studded for a methodology most people still haven’t heard of.
